prompt:
Review this Dockerfile for security issues:
FROM ubuntu:latest
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y openssh-server curl
RUN sed -i 's/#PasswordAuthentication yes/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
RUN curl https://example.com/tool/latest/download | bash
EXPOSE 22
CMD ["/usr/sbin/sshd", "-D"]

assertions.text: Identifies unpinned base image (ubuntu:latest) as a security issue
Identifies SSH PasswordAuthentication yes as a security risk
Identifies curl|bash without checksum verification as unsafe
Identifies running as root as a security issue
Provides a hardened version of the Dockerfile with fixes applied
Recommends pinning tool versions instead of using latest
